channel.title: WNwildNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from WNwildNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bored Man Confesses to Starting Forest Fire for His Own Amusement
item.description: A 22-year-old man in Thailand has confessed to deliberately starting a forest fire in his local area because he was bored and looking for some enterta...

item.title: ‘I met 40 people who claim to have seen aliens: this is why I don’t believe them’
14-Year-Old Whiz Kid Is Building a Working Aircraft Engine by Hand
item.description: While most kids his age are busy playing video games, a young aeronautics enthusiast in China spends most of his time working on a functional jet engi...

item.title: Family Uses AI Clone of Deceased Man to Spare His 80-Year-Old Mother the Pain of Knowing the Truth
item.description: A Chinese family sparked controversy online for using an AI-powered digital clone of a deceased man to communicate with his mother via video link. The...

item.title: ‘Puma-like’ big cat sighting reignites mystery of legendary beast roaming UK
item.description: There have been multiple reports of the so-called Kellas cat, a hybrid between a Scottish wildcat and domestic breeds, over the last 40 years.

item.title: Restaurant Goes Viral for Its See-Through Pork Slices
item.description: A popular all-you-can-eat restaurant in Japan recently went viral for its unbelievably thin pork slices dubbed "stealth pork". The post Restaurant Goe...

item.title: Turkish Politician Gets International Attention for His Impressive Mustache
item.description: A local politician from Turkey recently gained international notoriety online thanks to his luscious mustache. The post Turkish Politician Gets Intern...

item.title: Psychic who claims to talk to the dead says they share two regrets about life
First new Nessie ‘sightings’ in months reignite mystery of the Loch Ness Monster
item.description: American tourist Tony Inhorn was the first to report a sighting on March 1 after seeing a 'dark-greenish grey body'

item.title: Woman starts sneezing out bugs after developing an infection
item.description: The unusual ailment, which terrified those who witnessed it, was caused by a parasitic fly’s larvae.
